scripts.build: pnpm run generate:data && pnpm run check:size && pnpm run check:data && pnpm run check:generated-data && pnpm run verify:domain && vite build
scripts.refresh:market-data: pnpm run fetch:market-data && node scripts/convert-stocks-xlsx.mjs data/workbooks/stocks_latest.xlsx && pnpm run fetch:lp-data && pnpm run generate:data && pnpm run check:data && pnpm run check:generated-data
scripts.audit:formulas: uv run --no-project --with poetry poetry check && uv run --no-project python scripts/source_coverage_audit.py && uv run --no-project python scripts/formula_inventory_audit.py && uv run --no-project python scripts/formula_wiring_audit.py && uv run --no-project python scripts/chart_formula_audit.py && uv run --no-project python scripts/formula_audit.py
